ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_data" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime data entry */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the crime data was observed */,
  "category" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., Vehicle crime, Violent crime) */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Code for the area where the crime was committed */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area where the crime was committed */,
  "observed" INTEGER /* Observed frequency of the crime */,
  "trend" REAL /* Calculated trend of the crime frequency */,
  "latitude" REAL /* GPS latitude of the crime location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* GPS longitude of the crime location */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "suspect_description" TEXT /* Description of the suspect(s) if available */,
  "victim_description" TEXT /* Description of the victim(s) if available */,
  "evidence_collected" TEXT /* Evidence collected at the scene */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who reported the incident */,
  "external_data_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing external data (e.g., demographic data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES areas ("area_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_external_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("external_data_id") REFERENCES external_data ("external_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES crime_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the crime (e.g., 1 for low, 5 for high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_code" TEXT /* Code for the area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the area belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "area_size" REAL /* Size of the area in square kilometers */,
  "ethnic_diversity_index" REAL /* Index representing ethnic diversity */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the area */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Historical crime rate in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., police officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the crime data */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crime_data ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was reviewed */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file if stored externally */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "external_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of external data (e.g., demographic, economic) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the external data */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the external data */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the external data file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
